main_story.title: System Breach
main_story.summary: The player completes a friendly onboarding simulation with a temporary Cyberkin. Upon finishing, the congratulatory sequence glitches, the simulation collapses, and the player is forcibly pulled into the real NetGrid. The rookie Cyberkin dissolves, and the player awakens in the unstable entry layer with their true starter Cyberkin.

main_story.title: First Sector Dive
main_story.summary: The player dives into the first Sector through the stabilized Threshold Gate. The environment is partially corrupted, with flickering terrain and unstable nodes. The Sector Guardian is missing or weakened. The player must explore the area, stabilize the first real-world node, and confront a corrupted creature that blocks the path deeper into the Sector.

main_story.title: Guardian in the Dark
main_story.summary: After stabilizing the first Sector Node, the player follows a faint resonance trail deeper into the Sector. The environment becomes darker and more unstable. Corrupted wildlife attacks in coordinated patterns, suggesting intelligence behind the corruption. The player eventually finds the Guardian, weakened and partially corrupted, unable to maintain control of the Sector.

main_story.title: The Heart of Corruption
main_story.summary: Following the Guardian’s purified resonance, the player enters the Corruption Heart Chamber, a pulsating cavern filled with corrupted energy. The corruption reacts violently to the player’s presence. The player must navigate the chamber, avoid corruption pulses, and confront the Heart‑Beast — a massive corruption entity that seems to recognize the player. Defeating it stabilizes the Sector and reveals a memory fragment tied to the player’s past cycle.

main_story.title: The Path to Sector Two
main_story.sector: Sector 1 — Guardian’s Refuge → Sector Two Gate
main_story.summary: After purifying the Corruption Heart, the Guardian leads the player to the Sector Two Gate. The path is filled with corruption remnants and unstable terrain. The player must clear corruption clusters, stabilize the Gate’s resonance, and confront a lingering corruption entity attempting to block the path. Once the Gate is stabilized, the Guardian opens the way to Sector Two.

main_story.title: Into Sector Two
main_story.summary: After stabilizing the Gate, the player enters Sector Two. The environment is heavily corrupted, with terrain shifting unpredictably and wildlife behaving erratically. The player must explore the Arrival Zone, locate the Sector Two Guardian, and stabilize the first node. Along the way, they encounter a new type of corruption entity that reacts to the player’s resonance in unpredictable ways.

main_story.title: The Guardian’s Trail
main_story.summary: After stabilizing the Arrival Zone, the player follows the Guardian’s resonance deeper into Sector Two. The corruption becomes more aggressive, forming coordinated ambushes. The player must navigate the Corrupted Wilds, defeat corruption packs, and locate the Guardian hiding within a resonance cocoon. The Guardian reveals that the Dream Sector is collapsing and that a convergence event is imminent.

main_story.title: Sector Two: The Shattered Frontier
main_story.summary: The player arrives in the Shattered Frontier, where Dream fractals have begun appearing in the physical world. The corruption reacts violently to the convergence, creating unstable zones and hybrid enemies. The player must stabilize the Frontier, rescue trapped Cyberkin, and locate the Guardian, who is struggling to contain the collapse.

main_story.title: The Guardian’s Stand
main_story.summary: The player reaches the Inner Frontier, where the Guardian is barely holding back a massive corruption surge. The corruption forms a siege around the Guardian’s position. The player must break the siege, stabilize the Frontier Nodes, and confront the Siege‑Breaker — a massive corruption entity leading the assault. The Guardian reveals that the corruption is preparing to awaken the Prime Heart.

main_story.title: Toward the Prime Heart
main_story.summary: After breaking the siege in the Inner Frontier, the Guardian leads the player to the Heartbound Passage, a hidden corridor that connects Sector Two to the Prime Heart’s domain. The corruption has fortified the passage with Heartbound Sentinels. The player must clear the passage, stabilize its resonance, and prepare for the final convergence.

main_story.title: The Guardian’s Last Oath
main_story.summary: The player reaches the Heartbound Gate, where the Guardian stands ready to fulfill their final oath. The corruption launches a massive assault to prevent the Gate from opening. The player must defend the Guardian, stabilize the Gate’s resonance, and defeat the Heartbound Colossus. The Guardian reveals the truth: the Prime Heart is awakening, and only the player can confront it.

bond_quests.title: Echo of the Heart
bond_quests.summary: After leaving the Chamber of Cycles, the Cyberkin becomes withdrawn and unstable. It keeps hearing echoes of its past selves — some corrupted, some lost. The player must take it to a quiet region of the Convergence Expanse, help it confront its fractured memories, and anchor its identity through resonance.

sector_quests.title: Frontier Legends
sector_quests.summary: The player discovers an abandoned Frontier outpost containing old resonance logs. These logs tell the story of the Frontier’s first explorers and their battles against early corruption. The player must restore the logs, defeat lingering corruption remnants, and uncover the Frontier’s forgotten legacy.

stabilization_quests.title: Frontier Node Repair
stabilization_quests.summary: The corruption has damaged the Frontier’s primary travel node. The player must repair the node by gathering resonance cores, defeating corruption tendrils, and aligning the node’s energy flow. Once repaired, the node unlocks fast travel across Sector Two.
